section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES**
**Periodic Transaction Report**

Stamped: HAND DELIVERED. LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER, 2019 MAR -8 PM 3:36 (For Official Use Only). Handwritten initials "MC".

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** 202-225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ____ (File an original and 1 copy)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? Yes [ ]  No [X]
- Report type: [X] Initial Report   [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)

Transaction grid on this page contains no data rows; the body reads **"Please see the attached"** (transactions listed on following attachment pages).

*A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.*

uncertainties.note: top-right label partially obscured by HAND DELIVERED stamp; '__ of 6' legible, page number inferred as 1
